query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN purchaseCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN purchaseCost = 0 OR purchaseCost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_cost,
  SUM(purchaseCost) as total_purchase_cost
FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
